parents.subject: LU-12410 lnet: Add additional output to sanity-lnet.sh

commit.subject: LU-0000 mballoc: limit scanning + prefetching
commit.message:
LU-0000 mballoc: limit scanning + prefetching

- limit scan for a good group at the first two rounds
  when we hope to find very good chunks
- prefetch bitmaps for non-initialized groups

Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ia1b47d210e02b1e33a07973ddbad574b351b1d94
